commands: set -- submissions/*Advanced_Day3*.ipynb; if [ "$1" = 'submissions/*Advanced_Day3*.ipynb' ]; then echo 'ERROR: No matching Day 3 notebook found'; exit 1; fi; if [ "$#" -ne 1 ]; then echo 'ERROR: Multiple matching Day 3 notebooks found'; exit 1; fi; jupyter nbconvert --to script "$1" --output advanced_day3 --output-dir .
if [ ! -f advanced_day3.py ]; then echo 'ERROR: Notebook conversion failed - advanced_day3.py not found'; exit 1; fi
